name: STEPAN CO
business: Stepan Company produces specialty and intermediate chemicals, which are sold to other manufacturers and used in a variety of end products. Surfactants are the basic cleaning agent in detergents for washing clothes, dishes, carpets, fine fabrics, floors and walls. Polymers include polyurethane polyols used in rigid foam for thermal insulation, and Specialty Products are chemicals used in food, flavoring, nutritional supplement and pharmaceutical applications.
sellsTo: industrial cleaning and disinfection product manufacturers
coatings, adhesives, sealants and elastomers (CASE) applications
food, flavoring, nutritional supplement and pharmaceutical manufacturers

exposures.sentence: Stepan Company, which was incorporated under the laws of the state of Delaware on February 19, 1959, and its subsidiaries produce specialty and intermediate chemicals, which are sold to other manufacturers and used in a variety of end products.

Commercial and industrial applications include emulsifiers for agricultural products, emulsion polymers such as floor polishes and latex foams and coatings, wetting and foaming agents for wallboard manufacturing and surfactants for oilfield applications.
Polyurethane polyols are used in the manufacture of rigid foam for thermal insulation in the construction industry.

Commercial and industrial applications include emulsifiers for agricultural products, emulsion polymers such as floor polishes and latex foams and coatings, wetting and foaming agents for wallboard manufacturing and surfactants for oilfield applications.
Surfactants are the basic cleaning agent in detergents for washing clothes, dishes, carpets, fine fabrics, floors and walls.

catalysts.event: Start-up of new specialty alkoxylation facility in Pasadena, Texas
catalysts.sentence: This increase was primarily attributable to lower U.S. capitalized interest income recognized in 2025 as the Company's new specialty alkoxylation facility in Pasadena, Texas started up in April 2025.

catalysts.event: Implementation of Project Catalyst operational and efficiency plan
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company announced Project Catalyst, a comprehensive operational and efficiency plan with the objective to deliver approximately $100.0 million in pre-tax savings over the next two years.
For 2026, the Company estimates that total capital expenditures will be in the range of $100.0 million to $110.0 million.
